summary: Session opened. User requested: drop implementation section, deepen loss-ratio/financial detail, cover all services, run multi-expert panel review with full logging.
Original 3-page white paper preserved verbatim as v1 baseline before revision.
Plan: (1) write 12 specialist agents, (2) revise paper to v2-draft, (3) collect 12 expert reviews, (4) write discussion transcript + revision log, (5) ship final paper, (6) close session.
Financial-performance specialist — MLR, LR, LAE, combined/operating ratio, trend decomposition.
Actuarial specialist — IBNR, LDF, chain-ladder, BF, credibility, trend selection.
Stop-loss specialist — specific/aggregate attachment, lasers, run-in/out, recovery filing.
Network specialist — PPO/wrap/RBP/COE waterfall, NSA QPA/IDR, exclusivity & lineage.
UM specialist — prospective/concurrent/retro, MCG/InterQual, gold-card, denial defensibility.
PI specialist — leakage taxonomy, DRG validation, IBR, pre-pay shift.
Recovery specialist — TPL, MSP/Section 111, made-whole/common-fund, SoL discipline.
Rx specialist — PBM economics, spread vs pass-through, rebates, specialty, 340B.
FWA specialist — scheme taxonomy, provider profiling, NAIC anti-fraud, referral discipline.
WC specialist — compensability, state FS/UR, MMI, indemnity, MSA, RTW.
Care-management specialist — NCM, COE, trajectory triggers, member navigation, VBC.
Regulatory specialist — ERISA/ACA/MHPAEA/NSA/HIPAA/MSP/state DOI/state WC.

v2-draft written: implementation roadmap removed; new §1 financial lens with full loss-ratio family + CY/AY + paid/incurred/ultimate; new §2 service catalog enumerating all 12 service lines; §3 measurement contract retained and tightened; §4 structural failure modes; §5 operating-model principle.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: MLR credibility adjustment missing; ALAE/ULAE split; self-insured premium-equivalent; hedge trend ranges.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: define on-leveling; credibility weighting absent; elevate paid-vs-ultimate warning to ExSum.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: stop-loss savings-recognition mismatch (interaction with RBP/OON); ISL vs ASL; non-disclosure as dominant denial.
Accept w/ minor revisions. Top finds: PPO-discount-vs-Medicare illusion; RBP member-defense as non-negotiable; QPA documentation = IDR outcome.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: gold-carding missing; matched-cohort UM measurement; provider abrasion as measurable cost; cross-link to NQTL parity.
Accept w/ minor revisions. Top finds: PoS-vendor structural betrayal explicit; pre-pay edit governance; physician-reviewer DRG validation; state prompt-pay.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: MSP treble damages explicit; vendor-PoS vs trigger-detection tension; SoL as hard wall; WC third-party as distinct.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: specialty drug magnitude (~50% on <2%); rebate-aggregator; MAC manipulation; cross-links to site-of-care + parity.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: FCA/qui tam exposure; defamation guardrails; pre-pay-suspension due process; AKS/Stark on direct contracts/COE.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: indemnity layer paragraph; first-touch latency; state MPN rules; presumption statutes; med-only vs lost-time triage.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: action-gate discipline; member experience as hard constraint; matched-cohort CM ROI; NICU magnitude.
Accept w/ revisions. Top finds: MHPAEA comparative-analysis document; ERISA preemption mechanics; CAA gag-clause attestation; BAA requirement; state PBM 'rapidly evolving'.
All 12 reviews captured. Verdict tally: 12 ACCEPT WITH REVISIONS, 0 ACCEPT, 0 REJECT. No rewrite required; targeted edits across §1–§5.

Panel discussion captured: 6 rounds covering biggest gaps, service-line collisions, recovery ownership, regulatory ownership, what was left out, and what stays deferred. Closing line elevated into v3 ExSum/§5.
Revision log written. 50+ targeted edits accepted across §1-§5; 5 items deferred (state matrices, GLM examples, implementation sequence, vendor RFP scoring, lien-negotiation playbook).

v3-final published: ~5 printed pages, no implementation roadmap, full loss-ratio depth, 12-service catalog with cross-line coordination contracts and §2.12 service-line × compliance-gate matrix. v1 and v2-draft preserved in whitepaper/.

Session closed. Deliverables: 12 specialist agents (.claude/agents/), v3-final whitepaper, 12 reviews, discussion transcript, revision log, append-only session log. All cross-referenced; audit trail intact.
New session opened. User asked to shorten v3 (~5 pages, ~2,500 words) to exactly 3 pages while keeping perfect readability — all 12 services preserved, loss-ratio depth preserved.
v3 preserved as checkpoint before tightening.

Editorial-panel discussion captured: editor framed ~1,450-word budget; each of 12 experts stated irreducible core + what they could surrender; cross-references audited; 10-row decisions ledger produced (D1-D10).
Surrendered: $10M/$4M worked example, standalone LAE-attribution paragraph (migrated into ratio table). Held: ratio table, premium-equivalent caveat, paid-vs-ultimate warning.
Surrendered: bulleted §1.4 (collapsed to one paragraph). Held: 'report against ultimate' + 'every launch is process change'.
Surrendered: lasers detail, non-disclosure-as-dominant-denial. Held: ISL/ASL, 50%-notification failure mode, savings-recognition interaction with §2.4.
Surrendered: AKS/Stark caveat (migrated to §2.12 matrix); state OON jurisdictional matrix. Held: waterfall, exclusivity, lineage, PPO-discount illusion, RBP defense, QPA-determines-IDR.
Surrendered: provider-abrasion-as-cost (migrated to §4 as failure mode). Held: PA list central, gold-carding, matched-cohort, denial-vs-steerage.
Surrendered: pre-pay edit governance (compressed). Held: shift left, PoS-vendor betrayal, physician-reviewer DRG, 'invoicing not savings' line as §5 closer.
Surrendered: made-whole/common-fund doctrine names, WC-third-party distinct paragraph. Held: trigger detection, SoL as hard wall, MSP treble damages.
Surrendered: rebate-aggregator paragraph, parity cross-link (covered by matrix). Held: 50%/<2% specialty stat, spread vs pass-through, MAC manipulation, site-of-care.
Surrendered: defamation guardrails (migrated to §4 as failure mode). Held: intent inference, FCA / qui tam exposure for MA/Medicaid.
Surrendered: presumption statutes, state MPN-vs-NSA paragraph. Held: 'WC is not group health with different FS', indemnity as service line, 4-24h first-touch.
Surrendered: NICU-magnitude example, member-experience-as-hard-constraint (migrated to §4). Held: upstream-of-claim, COE benefit-design dependency, matched-cohort.
Surrendered: ERISA preemption mechanics paragraph, CAA gag-clause standalone paragraph. Held: NQTL comparative-analysis, BAA, compliance-gate matrix (replaces 12 individual cross-refs).

Editor closed cut-down session. v3 ~2,500 words → v4 ~1,800 words (~28% reduction). Decisions D1–D10 recorded; readability rules locked: no orphan sentences, thesis-line opens each section, every acronym defined on first use.

v4 published as new canonical 3-page paper. ~1,800 words, three tables (ratio family, compliance matrix, measurement contract), 12 service paragraphs at irreducible-core, 4 failure modes (consolidated from 6), single-paragraph close ending on the keeper 'invoicing not savings' line. v3 preserved as claim-cost-containment-v3.md.
Session closed. New deliverables: discussion-transcript-v4.md, claim-cost-containment-v3.md (preserved), claim-cost-containment.md (v4 canonical).
